sourceRef: tip:Tracking program changes without losing your mind

slides.headline: Track program changes
slides.body: Version your certifications, not your memory.

slides.headline: Create a timeline
slides.body: Start by creating a timeline of program changes. Use the 2023-2024 SAA letter for your chapter's rules as a reference.
bullets: Refer to the 2023-2024 SAA letter for your chapter's rules.

slides.headline: Update COEs
slides.body: Regularly update Certificates of Eligibility (COEs) to reflect program changes. Use the Yellow Ribbon Program as an example.
bullets: Refer to the Yellow Ribbon Program for examples of updates.
Ensure COEs align with current rules.

slides.headline: Maintain records
slides.body: Keep a record of all COE updates. This helps in tracking changes and maintaining compliance.

slides.headline: Stay informed
slides.body: Stay updated on new rules and changes. Subscribe to VA news and updates for timely information.

slides.headline: Review and adjust
slides.body: Review COEs and records regularly to ensure they are up-to-date. Adjust as necessary to comply with the latest regulations.
Ready to start? Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Version your certifications, not your memory. Track program changes with these 5 steps. Ready to start? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, as it could benefit from a more concise headline to match the other steps.
